{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324000805E778DFECA29C53A74DDC"}"},"total":636},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7382521270424453913","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者文笔有进步，比上一本苏木那本要好看。加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1718879629,"group_id":"7372840705837779993","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1CsN9PxBXEHv5S7GhbdEWjZy2UTsE19laLiIJX/MNDr","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1538916075963924","user_name":"禾子路"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1538916075963924","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1738327954,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7372840705837779993","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统+无金手指+硬核推理+刑侦破案+有女主】
调沈木来刑警队，是老所长临退休前对组织的唯一要求。
刑警大队长萧若舞泛起嘀咕：长相这么斯文能干刑警吗？
进刑警队第一次出现场，别人研讨案情，他现场到处逛，众人一筹莫展，他说发现了线索，一路追查，就此破获连宗杀人案。
沈木一战成名，至此更是连战连捷，自闭症儿童的杀人预言案、连环杀人碎尸狂魔案、医院的午夜红衣女子案……，极强推理能力使他参与的案子无不破获。
有人说江滨市刑警队有两大高手，没有沈木破获不了的案子，也没有萧若舞抓捕不了的犯罪嫌疑人。
超强神探搭配铿锵警花，他们就是罪犯的噩梦。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ef13a0096a3145a241804c8be7b580d6","author":"这键盘挺好用","author_id":"","book_id":"7372840705837779993","book_name":"推理之王：开局就是案中案","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7372841969027908121","read_count":"25035","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1386144"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"656","tags":"悬疑灵异,推理,破案,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0654e14bf32a94a7a9c4cd0e0412ba83~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779466086&x-signature=JOqw0vfjONryW2XG%2FcuWmLJvr2Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"75925426844","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"110"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324000805E778DFECA29C53A74DDC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":19,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":24387,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":26537,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":48804},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1718881620,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7504845852899984152","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"当一个破案小说挺不错的，虽然主角没有系统这种金手指，但是跟开挂没啥区别，总能发现一些细节，然后直接锁定凶手范围
中间写的案子，我感觉挺不错的，犯罪人是真的能跟警察斗上一斗的，虽然说他这个写的破案套路一模一样，都是找到细节，然后能抓到嫌疑人，然后来个反转，发现他只是个小喽啰再去抓，再来一个反转找到最后的犯罪人，但我个人来说我没有看腻，虽然说后面的案子就开始有点草率了，没有前面看起来那么精彩，但是也没草率多少就直接完结了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747363633,"group_id":"7372840705837779993","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwVJ0OadDnhUhTZmsMZbM1wb5KT751adtJiovBSfVXcf","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0657adf2c0244585a19395a2360e5799~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776882570&x-signature=8VaCEE%2FEPoTs9QmsuG0KTmPfBn0%3D","user_id":"3214599913747443","user_name":"夜望星满天"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3214599913747443","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7372840705837779993","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统+无金手指+硬核推理+刑侦破案+有女主】

65784","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"逻辑和细节着重描写，让看起来毫无头绪的案件，有了曙光。人物形象刻画也各有性格。青春年华的刑警表现喜怒哀乐，令人印象深刻，是一部值得推荐给大家的小说。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747918348,"group_id":"7372840705837779993","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6TEiliyS53mBDpoQMR25hxNyKWg4Ne1Jk8whIrTh0g3","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1789624626195299","user_name":"用户17896246"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1789624626195299","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1704966740,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7372840705837779993","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统+无金手指+硬核推理+刑侦破案+有女主】
